SEARCH

Interface IReadData

All Known Implementing Classes:
ReadData
public interface IReadData
Interface for reading data from files. Defines contract for classes that handle file input operations, including opening files and reading their contents into memory.
Version:
3.0
Author:
Christopher Perez

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ArrayList<String>
    getRawDataList()
    Retrieves the raw data read from the file.
    boolean
    openDataFile(String fileName)
    Opens a data file for reading.
    boolean
    readDataFile()
    Reads the contents of a previously opened file.

  • Method Details

    • openDataFile

      boolean openDataFile(String fileName)
      Opens a data file for reading. Verifies that the specified file exists and is accessible before attempting to read from it.
      Parameters:
      fileName - the path or name of the file to open
      Returns:
      true if the file was successfully opened, false otherwise

    • readDataFile

      boolean readDataFile()
      Reads the contents of a previously opened file. Processes the file line-by-line and stores the data internally for retrieval. Should handle IOException gracefully.
      Returns:
      true if the file was successfully read and stored, false if an error occurred during reading

    • getRawDataList

      ArrayList<String> getRawDataList()
      Retrieves the raw data read from the file.

      Returns the complete file contents as a list of strings, where each string represents one line from the file.

      Returns:
      an ArrayList containing all lines read from the file, or an empty list if no file has been read
